creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 231878
proposed tweaks before commit

hi Mina, per IRC here's a diff on top of your diff.

- appeases portlint -AC within reason, rclint, and portfmt
- creates the initial dir with correct permissions
- checked with sqlitedb
- added a doc section to gotosocial.in
- wrapped pkg-descr and makefile
- sort(1) pkg-plist
- only build on amd64 platforms
